document_metadata.title: Buffalo Wild Wings nears opening
document_metadata.first_words: Buffalo Wild Wings is finishing up its new location in Shawnee. According to a Facebook post Nov. 18, the restaurant is now hiring servers, bartenders, cooks and hospitality. The new site is located in Domino Plaza, at 4785 N Harrison, where a building is in the final stages of construction. Citing that it will be opening soon, a specific date has not yet been announced. Watch for updates.
